WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA / MODULE 8 / ASSIGNMENT
HOW TO USE THIS PDF
• 	The first time you open this PDF it will open in your browser
• 	Do not attempt to fill out the PDF in your browser; it will not save
• 	Instead, download the file to your own computer
• 	Then, open the file using a PDF reader
• 	Fill out the PDF, then click Save
• 	Follow the instructions below to post your work to the Facebook
group

WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA / MODULE 8 / ASSIGNMENT
YOUR ASSIGNMENT
Post a screenshot of your webinar business grid.
STEP #1
Complete the Webinar Business Grid (see next page).
Instructions: There are many ways to use webinars to build a sustainable
business aside from your primary sales webinar that you’ve developed or
worked on in this program. Using the grid provided below, choose 3 or more
strategies you plan to implement over the next 12 to 18 months. Then, indicate
your target date, along with a title (if applicable) and the top two or three
things you will do to make it happen.
For more on this topic see the lessons in Module 8.
STEP #2
On Saturday, you’ll see a post in the Webinar Funnel Formula Facebook group
with the following graphic. Post your assignment as a comment under this
graphic by 11:00 am ET September 9th:
